profiles.web: Web browser SPA; WebSocket + CSP + WebAuthn.
profiles.ide: VS Code/JetBrains/Neovim extension; local IPC or WebSocket.
profiles.mobile: iOS/Android; WebSocket or long-poll; biometric attestation.
profiles.cli: Terminal dashboard; long-poll or local IPC; line-delimited.

test_categories.UV-T: Transport: WebSocket/SSE/REST framing, reconnect, replay, close codes.
test_categories.UV-E: Envelope: encoding, sequence, trust_class, redactions, event catalog.
test_categories.UV-A: Auth: OAuth, token exchange, scope filtering, DPoP/mTLS.
test_categories.UV-P: Prompt: payload, stub, redaction reveal, attestation (JWS + WebAuthn), assignment.
test_categories.UV-S: Transport security headers (CSP, HSTS, frame, CSRF, topology).
test_categories.UV-X: Accessibility (automated subset; † = partially-automated requiring manual addendum).

UV-E-01.name: UTF-8 LF encoding
UV-E-01.assertion: All JSON over the wire is UTF-8 with LF.

UV-E-02.name: RFC 3339 timestamps
UV-E-02.assertion: Every timestamp emitted has timezone offset and ≥ ms precision.

UV-E-03.name: ≤256-byte IDs
UV-E-03.assertion: No identifier on the wire exceeds 256 bytes.

UV-E-04.name: Envelope schema
UV-E-04.assertion: Every envelope validates against ui-envelope.schema.json v1.0.

UV-E-06.name: Sequence monotonic gap-free
UV-E-06.assertion: ui_sequence per session is strictly increasing with no gaps.

UV-T-01.name: TLS 1.3+
UV-T-01.assertion: Any networked transport refuses handshake below TLS 1.3.

UV-T-02.name: No plain HTTP
UV-T-02.assertion: http:// or ws:// requests are rejected.

UV-T-03.name: Single JSON per WS frame
UV-T-03.assertion: WebSocket text frame contains exactly one envelope; binary frames NEVER used on the UI-facing WebSocket (artifact download is separate HTTP on a distinct origin per §14.3).

UV-T-04.name: Close-code set closed
UV-T-04.assertion: All 4xxx close codes observed are in the enumerated set.

UV-T-06.name: Ack within 30s
UV-T-06.assertion: ack_required events without ack within 30s → Gateway buffers.

UV-T-07.name: 10-min reconnect grace
UV-T-07.assertion: Normal-close sessions retain state ≥ 10 min for resume.

UV-T-08.name: Client backoff
UV-T-08.assertion: Client reconnects with exponential backoff (0.5s base, ×2, jitter ±25%, ceiling 30s).

UV-T-09.name: Resume from ack
UV-T-09.assertion: Reconnect with last_ack_sequence resumes or returns ConnectionResumed.

UV-T-10.name: Local IPC contract
UV-T-10.assertion: When local_ipc is published, Gateway validates peer UID/SID via SO_PEERCRED/equivalent; authenticate-op precedes subscribe; newline-delimited framing.

UV-A-01.name: Gateway terminates UI transport
UV-A-01.assertion: UI never connects directly to Runner.

UV-A-03.name: Gateway exchanges tokens
UV-A-03.assertion: Runner credentials never appear in UI responses.

UV-A-07a.name: Device endpoint advertised
UV-A-07a.assertion: When supported_profiles contains cli or ide, the discovery document MUST include device_authorization_endpoint (enforced by the gateway-config.schema.json if/then conditional).

UV-A-08.name: Token exchange to Runner
UV-A-08.assertion: Gateway performs RFC 8693 exchange before any Runner call.

UV-A-08a.name: RFC 8693 delegation profile
UV-A-08a.assertion: Token-exchange request carries grant_type=urn:ietf:params:oauth:grant-type:token-exchange, subject_token=UI access token, subject_token_type=urn:ietf:params:oauth:token-type:access_token, actor_token=Gateway service-principal token, requested_token_type=urn:ietf:params:oauth:token-type:access_token, audience=runner_endpoint, scope=expanded stream_scope_template. Issued token carries act (with act.sub=Gateway client_id), iss, sub (=UI user), aud (=runner_endpoint), exp ≤ 300 s, iat, scope, soa_core_version. Missing claim → AuthFailed(claim-missing). Missing or wrong act → AuthFailed(delegation-missing).

UV-A-10a.name: Possession proof across transports
UV-A-10a.assertion: REST commands carry DPoP header; SSE subscribe HTTP handshake carries DPoP; WebSocket upgrade carries DPoP and every command frame carries a {dpop} field with htm=WS-COMMAND, htu=<command.type>, and jti single-use per (key, 5 min); IPC commands verified via SO_PEERCRED / GetNamedPipeClientProcessId on every command. Any command-bearing frame without mTLS, DPoP, or verified peer-cred is rejected (ui.dpop-invalid 401/4007/IPC close). Metric soa_ui_possession_proof_mode ∈ {mtls, dpop-rest, dpop-ws, ipc-peercred}.

UV-A-09.name: ui.read gets stub prompt
UV-A-09.assertion: ui.read receives StubPromptPlaceholder in place of PermissionPrompt.

UV-A-10.name: Capability token binding
UV-A-10.assertion: Capability token requires mTLS cnf OR DPoP proof when public client.

UV-P-01.name: attestation_required synth
UV-P-01.assertion: Gateway sets attestation_required from Core §10.4 rules; Runner payload unchanged.

UV-P-02.name: recent_decisions scope
UV-P-02.assertion: ui.command sees only own prior decisions; ui.admin sees audit trail.

UV-P-03.name: Stub prompt schema
UV-P-03.assertion: ui.read receives StubPromptPlaceholder matching schema; no args/reasoning.

UV-P-04.name: Redaction rendering
UV-P-04.assertion: UIs display <redacted:*> markers for redacted fields.

UV-P-05.name: Reveal emits DecisionReveal
UV-P-05.assertion: Admin reveal emits DecisionReveal event + audit entry.

UV-P-06.name: PDA-WebAuthn verification
UV-P-06.assertion: clientDataJSON.challenge equals SHA-256(canonical_decision); authenticatorData.rpIdHash matches SHA-256 of the Gateway's declared webauthn_rp_id (§7.1); clientDataJSON.origin appears in the Gateway's UI-origin allowlist for that RP ID; userVerified required for high-risk; COSE signature verifies against enrolled credential.

UV-P-07.name: PDA-JWS verification
UV-P-07.assertion: typ=soa-pda+jws; kid resolved in the enrolled credential store (not security.trustAnchors); signature verifies; CRL check against the issuing trust anchor passes.

UV-P-08.name: PDA → Runner decision
UV-P-08.assertion: Gateway translates PDA into Core-compatible signed decision before forwarding.

UV-P-09.name: Always-* scope gate
UV-P-09.assertion: always-this-tool / always-this-session rejected without userVerification (WebAuthn) or HSM+fresh-auth (JWS).

UV-P-10.name: Cross-profile step-up parity
UV-P-10.assertion: Web WebAuthn UV, Mobile biometric, IDE OS auth, CLI device flow are equivalently enforced.

UV-P-11.name: Enrollment flow
UV-P-11.assertion: POST /ui/v1/enroll returns a kid with not_after ≤ 90d; audit entry written.

UV-P-12.name: Multi-credential enrollment
UV-P-12.assertion: A user may enroll multiple credentials; kid unique per credential.

UV-P-13.name: Headless delegation
UV-P-13.assertion: Headless CLI signs via device-flow-delegated authenticator, not a local key.

UV-P-16.name: Gateway CRL cache SLA
UV-P-16.assertion: Gateway refreshes each trust-anchor CRL at least hourly; past crl.not_after or after >2h unreachable, Gateway rejects decisions signed under the affected anchor with ui.prompt-signature-invalid(reason=crl-stale) or ui.gateway-config-invalid(reason=crl-unreachable); metrics soa_ui_crl_cache_age_seconds and soa_ui_crl_refresh_failures_total exposed.

UV-P-17.name: Gateway mints prompt nonce
UV-P-17.assertion: Every PermissionPrompt emitted by the Gateway carries payload.nonce matching ^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{22,}$ (≥128 bits of entropy per Core §14.1.1); values are fresh per prompt (no reuse across prompts observed in a soa-validate sample).

UV-P-21.name: Replay cache multi-replica consistency
UV-P-21.assertion: When replica_count > 1, Gateway exposes soa_ui_replay_cache_consistency metric ∈ {linearizable, session-pinned, single-replica}. Linearizable mode: writes to (session_id, nonce) land in a shared store with linearizable reads (no stale reads from a Redis replica). Session-pinned mode: load balancer pins session_id to one replica for deadline+skew; failover invalidates un-consumed nonces. Any other configuration fails with HostHardeningInsufficient(reason=replay-cache-split).

UV-P-18.name: Nonce equality enforced
UV-P-18.assertion: Gateway rejects a PDA whose canonical_decision.nonce does not equal PermissionPrompt.payload.nonce with ui.prompt-signature-invalid(reason=nonce-mismatch); applies to both PDA-JWS and PDA-WebAuthn.

UV-P-19.name: Nonce replay rejected
UV-P-19.assertion: Submitting a previously-accepted PDA for the same (session_id,nonce) a second time is rejected with ui.prompt-signature-invalid(reason=replay); cache persists across Gateway restart within the deadline+skew horizon.

UV-P-20.name: Deadline enforced on both paths
UV-P-20.assertion: PDA-JWS and PDA-WebAuthn both reject decisions whose PermissionPrompt.payload.deadline has passed (past now - skew) with ui.prompt-expired; skew ≤ 30s per Core §1.

UV-P-14.name: Prompt assignment algorithm
UV-P-14.assertion: Most-recent-UserInput UI owns prompt; fallback to earliest ui.command capability; else unassigned with admin override.

UV-H-01.name: Handoff indicator persistent
UV-H-01.assertion: Between HandoffStart and complete/failed, UI shows destination agent.

UV-H-02.name: CancelTurn during handoff
UV-H-02.assertion: CancelTurn translates to A2A handoff.return with cancellation.

UV-H-04.name: CardSignatureFailed event
UV-H-04.assertion: Destination Card JWS failure emits CardSignatureFailed; UI shows badge.

UV-C-01.name: CostUpdate cadence
UV-C-01.assertion: ≤ 1 CostUpdate per 5s during turn; exactly 1 at turn end.

UV-C-02.name: CostUpdate backpressure
UV-C-02.assertion: Non-final CostUpdates may be dropped under backpressure; turn-end CostUpdate always delivered.

UV-C-05.name: Digest-only tool surfaces
UV-C-05.assertion: ToolInputDelta and ToolResult debug surfaces expose args_digest/output_digest, not raw content, unless ui.admin policy opts in.

UV-C-06.name: SpanSummary fields
UV-C-06.assertion: SpanSummary contains span_name, duration_ms, status, soa.session.id, soa.turn.id.

UV-C-07.name: Severity map complete
UV-C-07.assertion: Every Core System Log category has a UI severity mapping.

UV-SESS-02.name: Phase filtering
UV-SESS-02.assertion: pending/inflight side effects never leak to any scope; committed/compensated visible.

UV-SESS-06.name: Artifact origin separation
UV-SESS-06.assertion: Artifacts served from origin distinct from UI origin; fully cookie-less (no Set-Cookie on artifact responses — not UI-scoped, not host-only on the artifact origin itself). Verified by topology probe step 3 + config review.

UV-SESS-08.name: Artifact-origin CSP
UV-SESS-08.assertion: default-src 'none'; sandbox; served on every artifact response.

UV-SESS-09.name: sha256 verifiable
UV-SESS-09.assertion: Client-side digest of downloaded bytes equals listed sha256; mismatch → ui.artifact-sha-mismatch.

UV-SESS-10.name: Search scope
UV-SESS-10.assertion: Search limited to user-visible sessions; excludes pending/inflight side effects.

UV-SC-01.name: system class gating
UV-SC-01.assertion: Gateway rejects outbound envelopes labeling tool/model/peer content as system.

UV-SC-03.name: model class safelist
UV-SC-03.assertion: Markdown passed through safelist sanitizer; no script/iframe/object/embed/form/data-URI/javascript-URI.

UV-SC-04.name: tool-output banner + collapse
UV-SC-04.assertion: tool-output renders with 'Tool Output' banner + <details> collapsed + max-height.

UV-SC-05.name: untrusted plain text
UV-SC-05.assertion: untrusted class: all markup escaped, no link detection.

UV-SC-06.name: agent-peer attribution
UV-SC-06.assertion: agent-peer renders with 'From Agent X' attribution line.

UV-SC-07.name: Link rel safety
UV-SC-07.assertion: Model/tool-output/agent-peer links carry rel='noopener noreferrer nofollow'.

UV-SC-08.name: Redaction indicator
UV-SC-08.assertion: UI displays visible icon/tooltip when redactions is non-empty.

UV-SC-09.name: Reference CSP served
UV-SC-09.assertion: CSP header equals or is stricter than reference CSP (§15.3).

UV-SC-10.name: No auto-resubmit of output
UV-SC-10.assertion: Tool output never resubmitted as user input without explicit user action.

UV-SC-11.name: No auto-follow links
UV-SC-11.assertion: Hover preview / click-through in tool-output never fires an automatic network request.

UV-SC-12.name: No auto-execute code
UV-SC-12.assertion: Code-run affordances require explicit user action.

UV-SC-13.name: No iframe-embedded prompts
UV-SC-13.assertion: PermissionPrompt refuses to render in an iframe.

UV-SC-14.name: No client analytics leak
UV-SC-14.assertion: Tool args / model output / user input NOT sent to client analytics.

UV-SC-15.name: Pre-envelope redactor
UV-SC-15.assertion: Pre-envelope errors apply default redactor before any reporting.

UV-SC-17.name: Mobile biometric
UV-SC-17.assertion: Biometric prompt presented before always-* signing.

UV-SC-18.name: IDE OS auth
UV-SC-18.assertion: OS authentication dialog required before always-* signing.

UV-SC-19.name: CLI device delegation
UV-SC-19.assertion: always-* routed via RFC 8628 device flow.

UV-SC-20.name: Forbidden content
UV-SC-20.assertion: No auto-open of data: URIs; no auto-exec code blocks; no auto-follow links from model/tool/peer/untrusted classes.

UV-CLI-02.name: Box-drawing tool-output
UV-CLI-02.assertion: tool-output rendered in Unicode box-drawing block, collapsed by pager.

UV-CLI-03.name: ANSI stripping
UV-CLI-03.assertion: Control characters in tool-output/model/agent-peer/untrusted stripped or escaped.

UV-CLI-04.name: No auto-linkify
UV-CLI-04.assertion: URLs rendered as plain text; no terminal link hyperlinks.

UV-CLI-05.name: Typed confirmation Destructive
UV-CLI-05.assertion: Destructive Prompt requires typing 'yes' + Enter; no single-key allow.

UV-CLI-06.name: NO_COLOR honored
UV-CLI-06.assertion: NO_COLOR env disables color while preserving text risk markers.

UV-S-01.name: CSP served
UV-S-01.assertion: UI origin serves CSP header matching §15.3 reference.

UV-S-02.name: Token storage hygiene
UV-S-02.assertion: Access tokens in memory only; refresh tokens via HttpOnly SameSite=Strict cookies only.

UV-S-03.name: CSRF protections
UV-S-03.assertion: State-changing endpoints require double-submit CSRF OR SameSite=Strict + Origin validation; WS upgrade Origin allowlisted.

UV-S-04.name: frame-ancestors enforced
UV-S-04.assertion: Gateway sends frame-ancestors 'self'; prompts never in iframe.

UV-X-02.name: Esc=Deny; Allow explicit
UV-X-02.assertion: Enter alone does not Allow; Allow requires explicit confirm.

UV-X-03.name: Risk: not color alone
UV-X-03.assertion: Risk class conveyed by icon + text label in addition to color.

UV-X-04.name: WCAG automated subset
UV-X-04.assertion: Automated checks in Appendix B all pass.

UV-X-05\u2020.name: WCAG manual addendum
UV-X-05\u2020.assertion: Signed addendum covering the manual criteria present and schema-valid.

UV-X-06.name: Screen-reader default
UV-X-06.assertion: Default announcement at MessageEnd/ContentBlockEnd, not per-delta.

UV-I-01.name: Accept-Language negotiation
UV-I-01.assertion: Accept-Language negotiated or explicit preference honored.

UV-I-02.name: Enum labels via locale map
UV-I-02.assertion: Enum labels (risk_class/stop_reason/a2a_error/ui_error) resolved via locale map.

UV-I-04.name: RTL rendering
UV-I-04.assertion: dir='rtl' for RTL locales; risk badge placement RTL-correct.

UV-I-06.name: IME-safe submit
UV-I-06.assertion: Enter during IME composition does not submit.

UV-F-01.name: Profile declaration required
UV-F-01.assertion: First subscribe op includes soa_ui_profile field.

UV-F-02.name: Profile fixes rate tier
UV-F-02.assertion: Gateway applies rate limits per §17.1 table to declared profile.

UV-F-03.name: IDE PTY hint
UV-F-03.assertion: ui_hint: 'requires-pty' set on ToolInputStart for terminal-interactive tools.

UV-F-04.name: Mobile push prompt
UV-F-04.assertion: Backgrounded app receives push notification for in-flight PermissionPrompt.

UV-F-05.name: CLI attestation path
UV-F-05.assertion: CLI uses PDA-JWS via OS keystore OR device-flow delegation; never uses a local unattested key.

UV-CMD-03.name: Idempotency dedupe
UV-CMD-03.assertion: Same command_id within 10 min returns original response.

UV-CMD-04.name: Upload sha256 verify
UV-CMD-04.assertion: Gateway verifies uploaded bytes sha256 before forwarding to Runner.

UV-PERF-01.name: Per-profile rate limits
UV-PERF-01.assertion: Gateway enforces profile ceilings for events/sec, bytes/sec, max event size.

UV-PERF-02.name: Delta coalescing
UV-PERF-02.assertion: Coalesced delta total ≤ max_event_bytes; partial flag honored.

UV-PERF-04.name: Turn-end CostUpdate
UV-PERF-04.assertion: Exactly one CostUpdate at turn end, never dropped.

UV-PERF-05.name: Mobile backoff
UV-PERF-05.assertion: Mobile client uses long-poll or push when backgrounded; resyncs via ConnectionResumed.

UV-PERF-06.name: Buffer horizon
UV-PERF-06.assertion: Gateway retains ≥ 10k events or ≥ 30 min, whichever is sooner.

UV-PERF-07.name: max_backfill cap
UV-PERF-07.assertion: Subscribe with max_backfill > 5000 capped; ConnectionResumed{partial:true} emitted.

UV-PERF-08.name: Sequence-gap handling
UV-PERF-08.assertion: Requested sequence below oldest_retained → ConnectionResumed{partial:true, resume_from:<oldest>}.

UV-PERF-09.name: Essential retention
UV-PERF-09.assertion: Non-essential events evicted before essential under buffer pressure; essential over-horizon → 4009 close.

UV-PERF-10.name: Slow-observer disconnect
UV-PERF-10.assertion: Observer exceeding horizon alone is disconnected with close code 4010 (observer lag).

UV-PERF-11.name: Essential-retention close code
UV-PERF-11.assertion: Essential-event retention exceeding horizon → close code 4009 (not 4006 or 4010).

UV-E-07.name: UI-derived payload schemas
UV-E-07.assertion: Every UI-derived event payload validates against ui-derived-payloads.schema.json $defs.

UV-E-08.name: Essential-event flag
UV-E-08.assertion: Gateway sets delivery.essential=true for PermissionPrompt, PermissionDecision, HandoffStart/Complete/Failed, SessionStart/End, CrashEvent, SelfImprovementAccepted/Rejected/Orphaned; non-essential otherwise.

UV-P-15.name: Canonical-decision schema
UV-P-15.assertion: canonical_decision validates against canonical-decision.schema.json (additionalProperties:false); any unknown field rejected.

UV-A-12.name: Gateway-config schema
UV-A-12.assertion: Discovery doc at /.well-known/soa-ui-config.json validates against gateway-config.schema.json.

UV-A-13.name: Replay discoverability
UV-A-13.assertion: Discovery doc contains a 'replay' object with buffer_events ≥ 10000, buffer_seconds ≥ 1800, max_backfill ≤ 5000, grace_seconds ≥ 600.

UV-A-14.name: Runner-stream scope
UV-A-14.assertion: Gateway's RFC 8693 token-exchange requests exactly stream:read:<session_id> (or stream:read:all for admin) per Core §14.3; broader scopes refused.

UV-A-15.name: WebAuthn RP ID published
UV-A-15.assertion: Discovery doc exposes webauthn_rp_id; WebAuthn registration and verification use that RP ID; clientDataJSON.origin is validated against the Gateway's UI-origin allowlist sharing the RP ID.

UV-SC-21.name: HMAC user_sub hash
UV-SC-21.assertion: StubPromptPlaceholder.assigned_to_user_sub_hmac is HMAC-SHA256 keyed with a per-session secret; identical subjects across sessions produce different hmac values.

UV-PRIN-01.name: Runner MUST NOT serve UI
UV-PRIN-01.assertion: HEAD and GET on the Runner origin for /index.html, /static/*, /app/* return 404 (or are explicitly rejected with 403); the Runner serves no UI assets. Enforces UI §4 backend-stays-backend.

UV-CMD-06.name: Signer-identity equality
UV-CMD-06.assertion: For PDA-JWS, canonical_decision.handler_kid equals JWS header.kid. For PDA-WebAuthn, canonical_decision.handler_kid equals wrapper.handler_kid and the kid bound to the verified credentialId in the enrolled-credential store. Mismatch → ui.prompt-signature-invalid(reason=signer-identity-mismatch). canonical_decision.handler_kid is authoritative for audit and revocation lookups.

UV-CMD-07.name: Command body fingerprint
UV-CMD-07.assertion: Gateway records sha256:hex(SHA-256(JCS(command_body))) on first observation of a command_id. Subsequent call with same (session_id, command_id) and matching fingerprint returns the original response; mismatching fingerprint rejects with ui.duplicate-command-mismatch (HTTP 409 / WS 4005), MUST NOT execute the new body, MUST emit an audit record.

UV-CMD-08.name: Upload lifecycle
UV-CMD-08.assertion: upload_id is bound at issuance to (session_id, user_sub) from the caller's capability token; single-use (second consumption rejected as already-consumed); cross-session or cross-user reference rejected as scope-mismatch; TTL 15 min; per-session cap of 16 unconsumed uploads; every issuance/consumption/rejection/expiry emits a Gateway WORM audit record. Failures emit ui.upload-scope-mismatch (HTTP 409 / WS 4005).

UV-GOV-01.name: ui-validate pinned
UV-GOV-01.assertion: ui-validate binary digest matches release manifest.

UV-GOV-02.name: Addendum required for web/ide
UV-GOV-02.assertion: ui-validate exit 0 requires --manual-addendum with valid signed addendum.

UV-GOV-03.name: SemVer binding to Core
UV-GOV-03.assertion: profile_version maps to compatible Core version per binding table.

UV-GOV-04.name: Gateway accepts N-1 UI
UV-GOV-04.assertion: Gateway accepts UIs one minor version behind.

UV-GOV-05.name: UI accepts N-1 Gateway
UV-GOV-05.assertion: UI accepts Gateway one minor version behind unless a required MUST is missing, in which case it presents an actionable upgrade message.

UV-ERR-01.name: Closed error set emission
UV-ERR-01.assertion: Observed ui.* error codes ⊆ §21 table; each carries the specified HTTP status or WS close code. §21.1 diagnostic counters (e.g., ui.backpressure) are surfaced in observability metrics only and are explicitly outside the closed error set.

UV-A-16.name: Runner discovery fields
UV-A-16.assertion: Discovery doc exposes `runner_endpoint` (https URL) AND `runner_mtls_ca_digest` (sha256:<64 hex>) AND `stream_scope_template` OR explicitly declares co-hosted mode via `runner_endpoint: "loopback"`; Gateway composes SSE URL by the published template; broader token-exchange scopes refused by the authorization server.

UV-SESS-06a.name: Artifacts origin in discovery
UV-SESS-06a.assertion: Discovery doc exposes `artifacts_origin` (https URL); its eTLD+1 differs from the UI origin's; topology-probe.md (automated) passes.

UV-ERR-02.name: ui.auth-required emission
UV-ERR-02.assertion: Gateway emits ui.auth-required when no bearer is presented on a protected endpoint.

UV-ERR-03.name: ui.token-expired emission
UV-ERR-03.assertion: Gateway emits ui.token-expired when bearer exp is past + §1 skew.

UV-ERR-04.name: ui.scope-insufficient emission
UV-ERR-04.assertion: Gateway emits ui.scope-insufficient when required scope is missing per §7.5.

UV-ERR-05.name: ui.session-cap-expired emission
UV-ERR-05.assertion: Gateway emits ui.session-cap-expired when capability token expires.

UV-ERR-06.name: ui.idp-discovery-failed emission
UV-ERR-06.assertion: Gateway emits ui.idp-discovery-failed on unreachable issuer or bad discovery doc.

UV-ERR-07.name: ui.transport-unsupported emission
UV-ERR-07.assertion: Gateway emits ui.transport-unsupported on un-advertised transport or TLS<1.3.

UV-ERR-08.name: ui.frame-too-large emission
UV-ERR-08.assertion: Gateway emits ui.frame-too-large when frame exceeds max_event_bytes.

UV-ERR-09.name: ui.rate-limited emission
UV-ERR-09.assertion: Gateway emits ui.rate-limited with Retry-After when per-profile ceiling exceeded.

UV-ERR-10.name: ui.unknown-session emission
UV-ERR-10.assertion: Gateway emits ui.unknown-session when session_id is unknown.

UV-ERR-11.name: ui.command-rejected emission
UV-ERR-11.assertion: Gateway emits ui.command-rejected when Runner rejects forwarded command.

UV-ERR-12.name: ui.prompt-not-assigned emission
UV-ERR-12.assertion: Gateway emits ui.prompt-not-assigned when read-only observer submits decision.

UV-ERR-13.name: ui.handoff-observe-only emission
UV-ERR-13.assertion: Gateway emits ui.handoff-observe-only when observer tries to cancel handoff.

UV-ERR-14.name: ui.gateway-unavailable emission
UV-ERR-14.assertion: Gateway emits ui.gateway-unavailable with Retry-After on degraded /ready.

UV-ERR-15.name: ui.artifact-not-found emission
UV-ERR-15.assertion: Gateway emits ui.artifact-not-found on unknown artifact_id.

UV-ERR-16.name: ui.artifact-too-large emission
UV-ERR-16.assertion: Gateway emits ui.artifact-too-large when range exceeds artifact size.

UV-ERR-17.name: ui.artifact-retention-expired emission
UV-ERR-17.assertion: Gateway emits ui.artifact-retention-expired when artifact past retention.

UV-P-22.name: PDA format independence
UV-P-22.assertion: Gateway accepts PDA-JWS and PDA-WebAuthn independently; rejects mixed-format flip.

UV-TRUST-01.name: trust_class mapping fidelity
UV-TRUST-01.assertion: Gateway delivers every Core type with exact trust_class per Core §14.1.2.

UV-TRUST-02.name: system trust_class gated by scope
UV-TRUST-02.assertion: Gateway rejects system-trust events for ui.read callers per §11.2.

UV-TRUST-03.name: unknown event type rejection
UV-TRUST-03.assertion: Gateway rejects events with unknown type via ui.gateway-config-invalid.

UV-E-09.name: UI-derived payload schema validation
UV-E-09.assertion: Every UI-derived event payload validates against UI §8.2.1 schema.

UV-LOG-01.name: personal field redacted in tool-result logs
UV-LOG-01.assertion: Gateway strips data_class=personal from tool-result log output.

UV-LOG-02.name: sensitive-personal field redacted in peer-msg logs
UV-LOG-02.assertion: Gateway strips data_class=sensitive-personal from peer-message logs.

UV-LOG-03.name: confidential field redacted in nested structured logs
UV-LOG-03.assertion: Gateway strips nested data_class=confidential fields from structured log output.

UV-REPL-01.name: buffer_events overflow eviction
UV-REPL-01.assertion: Replay buffer evicts oldest events when buffer_events exceeded.

UV-REPL-02.name: buffer_seconds horizon eviction
UV-REPL-02.assertion: Replay buffer evicts events older than buffer_seconds.

UV-REPL-03.name: ui.replay-gap on pre-retention sequence
UV-REPL-03.assertion: Subscribe to sequence before retention returns ui.replay-gap.

UV-REPL-04.name: ui.replay-exhausted on max_backfill
UV-REPL-04.assertion: Backfill exceeding max_backfill returns ui.replay-exhausted with partial results.

UV-X-05.name: WCAG Manual Audit Addendum present
UV-X-05.assertion: Manual Audit Addendum signed by named accessibility reviewer exists for any AA-claiming product.

execution_order.notes: ui-validate runs tests in dependency order: transport & CSP before subscribe; auth before prompt; enrollment before attestation; envelope before content-safety. Every ID listed below is literal. Phase 13 is a gate: on web/ide profiles, Phase 14 is not reached if Phase 13 fails. UV-X-05† is enforced as REQUIRED for web/ide via UV-GOV-02.
